title: Alternate EoE live action sequence Line
display_title: Alternate EoE live action sequence Line
wikitext: []: Alternate EoE live-action sequence Line             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Nov 18, 2006 11:51 am First off, feel free to move this if you think this belongs in the disscuison thread instead. Rei, to Asuka in the scrapped EoE live-action sequence (See here http://www.angelfire.com/anime4/mdwigs/livesequence.html for more information if you have no idea what I'm talking about): "You're pretty cold-hearted, but you just become attached pretty easily, don't you... Like a keeping dog. And you're the type that recklessly and willfully causes men to misunderstand." Would anyone out there say this decribes Asuka to a T, or not at all? That last line especially strikes me as having happened in that whole EoE Pre-Instrumenality sequence with Shinji, speicifically the retake (no pun intended ) of the episode 15 kiss scene: Asuka says Shinji will never understand her (due to his supposed aroggance) as Shinji replies he can't if she never tells him anything (He makes a good point with that...) .

Rei, to Asuka in the scrapped EoE live-action sequence (See here http://www.angelfire.com/anime4/mdwigs/livesequence.html for more information if you have no idea what I'm talking about): "You're pretty cold-hearted, but you just become attached pretty easily, don't you... Like a keeping dog. And you're the type that recklessly and willfully causes men to misunderstand." Would anyone out there say this decribes Asuka to a T, or not at all? That last line especially strikes me as having happened in that whole EoE Pre-Instrumenality sequence with Shinji, speicifically the retake (no pun intended ) of the episode 15 kiss scene: Asuka says Shinji will never understand her (due to his supposed aroggance) as Shinji replies he can't if she never tells him anything (He makes a good point with that...) .
